sentiment.reasoning: The launch of a new platform is a positive product development that may drive incremental revenue growth over time.

headlines.headline: Nolvav Commerce sees 15% drop in new customer orders this quarter

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
